scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o dist/control-plane ./cmd/control-plane
scripts.format: files=$(find . -name '*.go' -type f) && if [ -n "$files" ]; then gofmt -w $files; fi
scripts.format:check: files=$(find . -name '*.go' -type f) && if [ -n "$files" ]; then test -z "$(gofmt -l $files)"; fi
